title: 100M TRADE REELS EVERLASTO BLUE POLYPROPYLENE POLY ROPE 6MM 8MM 10MM 12MM 14MM 16MM 24MM (6MM)
features: EVERLASTO 100M Trade Reels of Blue Polypropylene Rope - also known by the generic name of nylon rope.
STRONG AND HARDWEARING - UV stabilised, waterproof, resitant to acids, alkalis and biological attack. This rope will stand the test even in the toughest conditions.
VERSATILE - can be used in a range of applications such as in trade and DIY, transport, construction, marine, horticultural, leisure and many more. The perfect all rounder.

TIDY - these 100m trade reels are ideal for keeping in the home, garage, shed or van and easy to dispense from. Simply run the desired amout of rope off the reel for use and store the rest for next time or rewind the rope back on the reel after use.
EASY - tie knots with ease with this pliable rope that will hold knots well. Despite being easy to handle this rope is still tough and durbable and grips well.
QUALITY - 'Everlasto' products from James Lever of Bolton - the established name for quality ropes and twines in the UK, rope and twine manufacturers since 1856.
description: 100m trade reels - quality Everlasto blue polypropylene rope. Three strand twisted construction polypropylene rope. A synthetic rope that is tough and hard wearing, waterproof and does not shrink when wet. A versatile and good value rope widely used in the industrial, agricultural and leisure industries. A quality Everlasto product from James Lever of Bolton, ropes and twines since 1856.
